title: AgentContract
description: The strict contract every AEP-compliant agent MUST publish. Supersedes the v0.1 AgentDescriptor, which is retained as a subcomponent. An agent is AEP-compliant if and only if it publishes a valid AgentContract at its discovery endpoint and honours the guarantees declared within it.

aepVersion.description: The AEP version this contract conforms to. MUST match the protocol version negotiated during initialisation.

agentId.description: Stable identifier for the agent. MUST NOT change across versions of the same agent.

version.description: SemVer identifier for this agent revision. MUST be present; MUST change when behaviour changes.

descriptor.description: Identity, risk, lifecycle, and ownership metadata.

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the shape of inputs this agent accepts. MUST be a valid JSON Schema 2020-12 document. Evaluators MUST validate inputs against this schema before submission.

outputSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the shape of outputs this agent produces. MUST be a valid JSON Schema 2020-12 document. Evaluators MUST validate outputs against this schema before scoring.

contextModel.description: Describes what context this agent consumes and how test harnesses MUST inject it.

capabilities.description: Declared domains, actions, and modalities. See capabilities-registry.schema.json.

contextBundleRef.description: Pointer to the AgentContextBundle for evaluator orientation.

policyProfileRef.description: Pointer to the PolicyProfile. MAY require elevated test mode to retrieve.

evaluationModes.description: Evaluation modes this agent supports. Agents MUST support at least 'blackbox' and 'graybox'. Agents SHOULD support 'replay' for reproducibility.

determinism.description: How deterministic this agent is, and what knobs control it.

endpoints.description: URLs or paths exposing AEP methods. MUST include discovery, session, turn, trace, and result endpoints.

limits.description: Hard and soft limits evaluators MUST respect.

traceability.description: What reasoning, tool calls, and decisions the agent commits to expose via the trace interface.

datasetRefs.description: Optional (§11.6 Dataset extension). Opaque references to dataset documents covering this agent — URLs, OCI-style digests, or internal slugs. Purely discoverability; servers MUST NOT derive behaviour from dataset content.

compositeCapable.description: When true, this agent is safe to participate as a node in a composite session (§11.7 CSE extension). Agents that assume they own the session or maintain incompatible state conventions MUST declare this false.

schema.description: JSON Schema for this injection point's payload.

injectionPoints.description: Named slots where test harnesses MUST be able to inject context. An agent that does not declare injection points cannot be evaluated with realistic conditions.

historyModel.description: How the agent accumulates conversational state. MUST be declared for multi-turn agents.

maxHistoryTurns.description: Upper bound on history the agent will honour. Evaluators MUST NOT exceed this.

level.description: 'deterministic' = same input + context produces same output byte-for-byte. 'seeded' = same input + context + seed produces same output. 'stochastic' = no guarantee.

seedParameter.description: If level is 'seeded', the name of the input field carrying the seed.

replaySupported.description: Whether this agent can be run in 'replay' mode from a captured trace.

discovery.description: AEP discovery endpoint. Typically the path hosting aep.agent.list and aep.agent.get.

Limits.description: Servers MUST enforce these limits. Clients MUST respect them. Violations return error -32020.

reasoning.description: What level of reasoning the agent exposes via the trace interface.

toolCalls.description: What tool call detail is exposed in 'toolbox' mode.

policyEvents.description: What policy detail is exposed in 'policybox' mode. 'all' includes passed rules.

modelCalls.description: What underlying model call detail is exposed. 'full' includes prompts (privacy-sensitive).
